questions.question: An RGB image is converted to YCbCr color space. What is the primary purpose of this conversion?
questions.hint: The conversion is a standard technique in digital video processing and image compression.

questions.question: An image is blurred due to motion of the camera. Which color component is most affected by this blurring?
questions.hint: The Y-component, which represents the luminance, is more affected by blurring due to motion.

questions.question: A pseudocolor image is created by replacing the original RGB values with a limited set of colors. Which of the following is a suitable replacement strategy?
questions.hint: Options like quantization, histogram equalization, and vector quantization are commonly used in pseudocolor image processing.
